template.name: bank_statement_ingestion_inbound
template.description: Record an inbound bank statement line by debiting Settled (10100) and crediting the per-file Control (10102) on the economic ledger, with a mirror leg debiting Cash Balances FBO (11900) and crediting Cash Balances Control (11902) on the allocation ledger. Fires once per bank statement line item.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification on the economic ledger: Settled (10100) debit balance increases and Control (10102) credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

Asset-to-asset reclassification on the allocation ledger: Cash Balances FBO (11900) debit balance increases and Cash Balances Control (11902) credit balance increases equally. Total allocation ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: Bank statement line item is received for the Master FBO account. Fires once per inbound line item.

ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances FBO and Cash Balances Control positions are updated for FDIC tracking.
ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where Settled represents confirmed bank cash and Control stages the amount for reconciliation.

accounting_treatments.description: Reclassify confirmed inbound cash from Settled to Control for reconciliation staging; no P&L impact and no customer balance impact.
Record the FDIC fund location for the bank statement deposit by debiting Cash Balances FBO and crediting Cash Balances Control on the allocation ledger.

account_code_validations.description: House settled bank cash account (confirmed physical cash at Purple Splash FBO bank account).
House control (reconciliation staging) bank cash account; per-file instance selected by statement_file_id external_id.
Cash Balances FBO asset on the allocation ledger; debited to record FDIC fund location for the bank statement deposit.
Cash Balances Control on the allocation ledger; credited to stage the amount for reconciliation on the FDIC tracking ledger.

marketplace.description: White-labelled product line identifier for this bank statement line (e.g. CraftNest, QuickBite, SkillForge, SeatVault, StayLocal). Optional — used for analytics and audit traceability.

payment_rail.description: Inbound payment rail that originated the bank statement line (e.g. ACH, WIRE, PUSH_TO_DEBIT, PAYPAL). Optional — used for analytics and reconciliation traceability.

line_item_description.description: Optional human-readable description from the bank statement line.

statement_file_id.description: External_id of the source bank statement file; used to select the per-file Control account instance.

transaction_ref.description: Bank-provided transaction reference identifier for this statement line item.

line_count.description: Number of line items in the bank statement file.

total_amount.description: Total amount of all line items in the bank statement file, as a decimal string (e.g. "333.50").

legs.description: Record inbound bank cash: debit Settled (confirmed cash), credit Control (reconciliation staging).
Record FDIC fund location: debit Cash Balances FBO, credit Cash Balances Control for reconciliation staging.

examples.name: inbound_return_200
examples.description: Inbound return statement line item ($200). Dr Settled / Cr Control on economic, Dr CB FBO / Cr CB Control on allocation.

examples.name: inbound_deposit_333_50
examples.description: Inbound bulk deposit ($333.50). Dr Settled / Cr Control on economic, Dr CB FBO / Cr CB Control on allocation.

examples.name: inbound_deposit_10k
examples.description: Inbound bulk deposit ($10,000). Dr Settled (10100) / Cr Control (10102) on economic, Dr CB FBO (11900) / Cr CB Control (11902) on allocation.
